[It's a okish night in the P corp backstreets. The biggest news recently is the destruction of a Urban Nightmare tier incident, some kinda theme park that you never got the name of. Of course, just one solved incident does not a peace make, and you've been thinking of getting involved with the fixer business...Issue is the usual sheer price of an actual combat durable outfit. Thankfully through asking some other novices around, you actually managed to locate a surprisingly 'cheap' tailor that's a bit obscure. Going there, you meet the rather...eccentric 'Barber', who already is willing to take your measurements and discuss the fees involved. But you quickly notice that it's not in Ahn, it's in milliliters of...fluids. OH FUCK YOU WALKED INTO A CUMFIENDS HOUSE....Maybe you'll still get some clothing, though?]
